zh.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林
zh.lifeSummary: 當David Thompson於1591年1月17日出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，他的父親John Thomson26歲，母親Margaret Walker Thomson29歲。他於1630年9月23日與Marion Meek在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Thompson于1591年1月17日出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，他的父亲John Thomson26岁，母亲Margaret Walker Thomson29岁。他于1630年9月23日与Marion Meek在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Thompson was born on 17 January 1591, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Thomson, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Walker Thomson, was 29. He married Marion Meek on 23 September 1630, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Thompson est né le 17 janvier 1591, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thomson, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Walker Thomson, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Marion Meek le 23 septembre 1630, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Thompson am 17. Januar 1591 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thomson 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Walker Thomson 29. Er hat am 23. September 1630 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Marion Meek geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Thompson è nato il il 17 gennaio 1591 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Thomson, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Walker Thomson, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Marion Meek il 23 settembre 1630, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: David Thompsonが1591年1月17日にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父John Thomsonは26歳，母Margaret Walker Thomsonは29歳であった。1630年9月23日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでMarion Meekと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: David Thompson(이)가 1591년 1월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomson(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Walker Thomson(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1630년 9월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Marion Meek(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Thompson nasceu em 17 de janeiro de 1591, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thomson, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Walker Thomson, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Marion Meek em 23 de setembro de 1630, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Thompson родился 17 января 1591 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thomson было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Walker Thomson, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Meek 23 сентября 1630 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Thompson nació el 17 de enero de 1591, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thomson, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Walker Thomson, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Marion Meek el 23 de septiembre de 1630, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
